childhood.familyBackground: Born into a Swiss pharmaceutical family with generations of business experience in healthcare sector.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 의료 부문의 사업 경험을 가진 스위스 제약 가문에서 출생
childhood.education: University of Zurich (Medicine and Business Administration)
childhood.earlyLife: Raised in Zurich with exposure to Swiss pharmaceutical and healthcare industry. Developed early interest in combining medicine with business management.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 취리히에서 성장하며 스위스 제약 및 의료 산업에 노출. 의학과 사업 경영을 결합하는 데 관심 개발

careerTimeline.event: Joined family pharmaceutical company in management role
Led expansion into biotechnology and specialty pharmaceuticals
careerTimeline.eventKo: 생명공학 및 특수 의약품으로 확장 주도

careerTimeline.event: Expanded healthcare operations across European markets
careerTimeline.eventKo: 유럽 시장 전역에 의료 사업 확장

careerTimeline.event: Diversified portfolio into medical devices and diagnostics
careerTimeline.eventKo: 의료기기 및 진단 분야로 포트폴리오 다각화

failures.description: Several pharmaceutical drug candidates failed clinical trials during development
failures.descriptionKo: 개발 중 여러 제약 약물 후보가 임상 시험에서 실패
failures.lesson: Improved investment in research infrastructure and partnership strategies with academic institutions
failures.lessonKo: 연구 기반시설 투자 및 학술기관과의 파트너십 전략 개선

quotes.text: Healthcare innovation requires patience and persistence through many failures
quotes.textKo: 의료 혁신은 많은 실패를 통해 인내와 지속성이 필요합니다

recommended.title: The Innovators: How a Group of Hackers, Geniuses, and Geeks Created the Digital Revolution
recommended.author: Walter Isaacson
recommended.note: On innovation and entrepreneurship in technology and science
recommended.noteKo: 기술 및 과학의 혁신과 기업가정신에 관한 책

personalTraits.knownFor: Leading Swiss pharmaceutical expansion into biotechnology, healthcare portfolio diversification
personalTraits.knownForKo: 스위스 제약의 생명공학 확장 주도, 의료 포트폴리오 다각화
personalTraits.philanthropy: Supports medical research and Swiss universities
personalTraits.philanthropyKo: 의료 연구 및 스위스 대학 지원
